title: Cucumber & Wakame Salad with Peanut Sauce
summary: Bulked-out cucumber and seaweed salad with a glorious creamy peanut dressing. A great dish to eat fresh, or even meal prep.

method.description: Put all the dressing ingredients into a bowl and stir together until fully incorporated. Add 1 tbsp cold water at a time until creamy. Taste and season with salt, then set aside.

Place the wakame into a bowl and cover with cold water. Trim and quarter the cucumbers. Crush or bash the cucumber pieces using a heavy item or rolling pin until they break open, then cut them into 2cm pieces. Trim and quarter the radishes, then tip them and the cucumber pieces into a mixing bowl.

Reheat the grains and allow to cool slightly until warm. Toss them into the veggies. Drain the wakame and add to the mixing bowl along with the dressing. Toss together until evenly distributed, then share between plates.

chefs.name: Chloe René
chefs.summary: Chloe (@chlo_eat) takes inspiration from her diverse upbringing to create recipes and dishes influenced from cultures around the world. Despite her classical training, Chloe's philosophy in the kitchen revolves around simplicity and home-cooking. She firmly believes that the essence of a great meal lies in the quality of ingredients and the care put into their preparation. Instead of relying on complex and technical processes, Chloe prizes the art of letting ingredients shine through, enhancing their natural flavours with a delicate touch.
